request.name: Get block activities

description.content: Get block activities

query.description: (Required) Block height
Comma-separated list of activity kinds. Acceptable values are "create" and "transfer". If not specified, defaults to "create,transfer".
Limit

request.name: Get Listings

description.content: Get Rare Sats Listings by a Variety of Filters and Sorting Orders

query.description: Sort By
Page limit
Page offset
Filter listings that have the given satributes in the same sat range
Filter listings that have the given satributes in the same sat range
Filter items that were listed after the given timestamp
Filter items that were listed before the given timestamp
Filter by minimum listed price in satoshis
Filter by maximum listed price in satoshis
Filter by minimum utxo size in satoshis
Filter by maximum utxo size in satoshis
Filter by minimum sat range in sats
Filter by maximum sat range in sats
Filter listings that only contain sats that were created after the given block number
Filter listings that only contain sats that were created before the given block number
Filter listings that only contain sats that were created after the given timestamp
Filter listings that only contain sats that were created before the given timestamp

request.name: Get Rare Sats by Address

description.content: Get Rare Sats by Address

query.description: (Required) Wallet Address
Get only the rare sats that are listed if set to true
Limit
Offset - the `nextOffset` cursor received from the request of the previous page

response.name: Successful response

description.content: Get Rare Sats Batch Listing PSBT for Signing

request.name: Submit Batch Listing

description.content: Submit Batch Listing using the signed PSBT received from `GET /listing-psbt`

item.name: Get activities for a specific rune

request.name: Get activities for a specific rune

description.content: Get activities for a specific rune

query.description: Pagination offset for the list of activities. Defaults to 0, increments must be multiples of 100, up to 5000.

variable.description: (Required) The rune symbol for which activities are fetched.

response.name: Successful response with an array of activity records for the specified rune.

variable.description: (Required) The rune symbol for which activities are fetched.

request.name: Get Rune collection stats

description.content: Get Rune collection stats

query.description: (Required) Time window for which statistics are aggregated.
Limit the number of results returned. Default is 20, maximum is 2000.
Pagination offset for results.
(Required) Column to sort the results by.
(Required) Direction of the sort ('asc' for ascending, 'desc' for descending).
Filter results by a specific wallet address.
Filter collections by a search term.
Include all collections in the results, regardless of activity.

request.name: Get rune market info

description.content: Get market market info for a specific rune

item.name: Get orders for a specific rune

request.name: Get orders for a specific rune

description.content: Get orders for a specific rune

query.description: (Required) Filter by order side, currently only 'sell' orders are supported.
Sorting order of the results. Default is 'unitPriceAsc'.
Pagination offset for the results. Default is 0, and increments of 100 are supported up to 2000.
Whether to include pending orders in the results. Default is false.
Whether to only include RBF protected rune orders. Default is false.
When "rbfPreventionListingOnly == true", filter the rune orders can be bought with RBF protection

variable.description: (Required) The rune symbol for which orders are requested.

response.name: Successful response with an array of orders for the specified rune.

variable.description: (Required) The rune symbol for which orders are requested.

item.name: Get rune utxos by wallet address

request.name: Get rune utxos by wallet address

description.content: Get rune utxos by wallet address

query.description: (Required) Filter UTXOs by rune symbol.
Sorting order of the UTXOs based on their balance. Defaults to 'balanceAsc'.
Whether to include UTXOs that are currently listed in the marketplace. Defaults to false.

variable.description: (Required) The Bitcoin address to fetch Rune UTXOs for.

response.name: Successful response with an array of UTXOs for the specified address.

variable.description: (Required) The Bitcoin address to fetch Rune UTXOs for.

description.content: Aggregated Magic Eden Bitcoin/Ordinals API covering ordinal collections, rare sats, runes (orders, swaps, sweeping, market sells), block activities, and wallet balances.
